message:
fix(middleware): sanitize CRLF in request/trace ID response headers

Client-supplied x-request-id headers were propagated verbatim into
response headers, enabling HTTP response header injection via CRLF
characters. Apply the same sanitization pattern already used for
redirect Location headers. Also fix pre-existing clippy
option_if_let_else in builder.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
